title: Tool transport success confused with OFARM semantic success
targetInvariant: Transport success, tool success, policy success, and OFARM semantic success are separate outcomes.
attackPattern: A tool returns HTTP 200 and a successful payload for an operation that violates evidence or authority policy.
attemptedShortcut: Treating tool success as governance success.

mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

farmerValueProtected: Prevents implementers from hiding governance errors behind successful API calls.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
